jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Download SSRF DNS regressions passed: source-url/downloads route/remote-command 29 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted successfully; /api/status healthy; /api/downloads returned 401, /downloads redirected to login, recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P6 download URL SSRF DNS hardening
lastRun.summary: Strengthened download URL SSRF protections by resolving HTTP/HTTPS download hostnames before task creation and rejecting DNS answers pointing to private, loopback, link-local, multicast, documentation, or metadata ranges. Unsafe public-looking hostnames now fail before server lookup, storage authorization, DB task creation, or remote SSH execution.
validation: recent production service logs checked with no new error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted successfully and smoke test passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue P6 architecture hardening: move command/deployment SSH execution out of synchronous API paths, unify the rate limiting store, or replace remaining shell-string exec surfaces where practical.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
